objective: Replace the inbound/Loop pullquote with a verified factual HubSpot highlight that supports Loop Marketing as an AI-era operating model, without changing the published post.

changes.proposedText: Según HubSpot, el 61 % de los marketers cree que el marketing vive su mayor disrupción en 20 años por la IA; el Loop convierte esa presión en ciclos cortos de aprendizaje, no en campañas más pesadas (HubSpot, State of Marketing 2026).
changes.rationale: Use a verified HubSpot factual highlight that supports the article's argument that Loop Marketing adds AI-era agility on top of inbound.

sourceEvidence.label: HubSpot State of Marketing 2026
sourceEvidence.fact: 61% of marketers believe marketing is experiencing its biggest disruption in 20 years due to AI.
